name: confluence-mcp
description: Confluence MCP Server – CQL full-text search, page read/create/update, space listing, and inline comments for knowledge base management

tools.name: confluence_health_check
tools.description: Test connection, verify credentials, and get account/space info

tools.name: search_content
tools.description: CQL full-text search across pages and blog posts

tools.name: get_page
tools.description: Get full content of a page by ID

tools.name: create_page
tools.description: Create a new page in a specified space

tools.name: update_page
tools.description: Update an existing page with new content

tools.name: list_pages_in_space
tools.description: List pages within a specific space

tools.name: add_page_comment
tools.description: Add an inline comment to a page
